original_prompt:
A 4x4 grid of 16 CIRCULAR ICON BADGES for the app 'Wodouyao' (dark-mode desktop terminal multiplexer). Each cell contains ONE perfectly round circle badge filled with a flat solid color, with a single simple flat icon shape centered INSIDE each circle. Background outside the circles is solid #1a1b26 navy, but I don't care about the background — only what's INSIDE each circle matters.

ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL: every icon must be contained entirely inside its circle badge. Circle badges are tangent to each other but do not overlap. Uniform circle size, equally spaced.

The 16 circles (with fill color and centered glyph), left-to-right, top-to-bottom:
1. Blue #7aa2f7 circle with white 'W' monogram in the center
2. Dark navy #1a1b26 circle with a white arrow cursor pointer
3. Dark navy circle with a white dashed rectangle outline
4. Dark navy circle with two white dots connected by a curved line
5. Dark navy circle with an orange #ff9e64 8-point asterisk star
6. Dark navy circle with a solid green #9ece6a diamond
7. Dark navy circle with a cyan #7dcfff diamond outline (hollow)
8. Dark navy circle with a white solid rectangle block
9. Dark navy circle with a green #9ece6a filled dot surrounded by a green ring
10. Dark navy circle with a bold white X mark
11. Dark navy circle with a yellow #e0af68 lightning bolt
12. Dark navy circle with two vertical purple #bb9af7 pause bars
13. Dark navy circle with three white dots and short motion trails
14. Dark navy circle with two overlapping purple #bb9af7 sine waves
15. Dark navy circle with three white figure silhouettes
16. Dark navy circle with a white gear cog outline

FLAT VECTOR style. Icons are crisp simple geometric shapes. Glyph inside each circle occupies about 60 percent of the circle diameter. Glyph strokes are 3px thick and clean. The circle edges themselves are smooth and solid (no glow, no shadow, no gradient). No labels, no text anywhere.
